readinessNote: This exhausts the largest remaining immediate-post-咗 POS bucket: exact preceding v/v1/xv + 咗 + following m. It supplies classified attestation and boundary evidence but cannot establish productivity, complete lexical scope, corpus readiness, status, or promotion.

claimCrosswalk.corpusQuestion: Does HKCanCor naturally attest lexical V + perfective 咗 + a quantified or measure-onset overt NP in this bounded query?
Does every token tagged v, v1, or xv + 咗 + an m-tagged token instantiate the narrow overt-object profile?
Can this complete measure-onset slice settle unrestricted predicate-object productivity or all temporal, completion, boundedness, and current-relevance analyses?

decisions.reviewerNote: 幾次 counts occurrences of 包紮咗 and is not a theme object.
decisions.exclusionReason: Frequency complement falls outside the narrow overt-object profile.

decisions.reviewerNote: 睇咗幾次跌打 can analyze 幾次 as event frequency before 跌打 or the whole sequence as a quantified treatment NP; local context does not settle it.
decisions.exclusionReason: Measure attachment and the object boundary remain unresolved.

decisions.reviewerNote: 好多個月 measures the duration of earning before 錢 and is not the immediate object onset.
decisions.exclusionReason: Duration complement intervenes before the lexical object.

decisions.reviewerNote: 兩隻狗 is the overt quantified object of 養咗.
好多人 is the postverbal subject of unaccusative 死咗, not an object.
decisions.exclusionReason: Postverbal subject belongs to a non-object predicate profile.

decisions.reviewerNote: 好多包 is the overt quantified package object of 食咗.
好多份 is the overt quantified application or position object of 見咗 in the job-search context.
一間 resumes a school or employer and is the overt object of 見咗.
三次 counts interview occurrences after objectless 見咗.
decisions.exclusionReason: Frequency complement falls outside the narrow overt-object profile.

decisions.reviewerNote: 一份 is the overt headless job object found through an agent.
一個禮拜 measures the duration of the separable 放假 expression rather than a theme object.
decisions.exclusionReason: Duration inside a separable activity profile is outside the narrow object claim.

decisions.reviewerNote: 一啲 translator 嗰啲 denotes overt job applications and is the object of 報咗.
幾封信 is the overt quantified object of 寄咗.
一本書 is the overt quantified object of 印咗.
Despite the self-correction from 一萬 to 一千, the utterance has an overt quantified copy object of 影印咗.
兩本字典 is the overt quantified object of 買咗.
一本 denotes the volume that came out and is a postverbal theme/subject of 出咗, not an object.
decisions.exclusionReason: Publication-appearance profile is nontransitive here.

decisions.reviewerNote: 一本 is the overt headless book object of 介紹咗 before the recipient phrase.
一本字典 is the overt quantified object of 買咗.
一本 Comprehensive Grammar is the overt quantified object of 買咗.

decisions.exclusionReason: Duration complement falls outside the narrow overt-object profile.

decisions.reviewerNote: 冇咗一日 expresses loss of a day, outside the current action-predicate object profile.
decisions.exclusionReason: Loss/absence 冇咗 is outside the current narrow claim.

decisions.reviewerNote: 一個星期 measures trip duration after 去咗.
decisions.exclusionReason: Duration complement falls outside the narrow overt-object profile.

decisions.reviewerNote: 兩句 is the overt quantified utterance object of 講咗.
好多份信 is the overt quantified object of code-switched send咗.
成一百封信 is the overt quantified object of code-switched send咗.
一球 is the score differential by which the match was won, not a theme object.

decisions.reviewerNote: 一上斜 begins a repeated-event clause complement of 習慣咗, not an NP object.

decisions.reviewerNote: 好多錢 is the overt quantified amount object of 借咗.

八萬 is the overt headless money-amount object of 借咗.
八萬, immediately self-corrected to 七萬幾八萬, is the overt money-amount object of 借咗.
三萬蚊 is the overt quantified money object of 使咗.
三萬 is the overt headless money-amount object of 使咗.

decisions.reviewerNote: 好多琉磺 is the overt quantified substance object of 吸咗.

一張中文嘅操作程序 is the overt document object of 附帶咗.
The repeated repaired predicate again takes 一張中文嘅操作程序 as its overt object.
三年零七個月 measures the duration of working at the hospital.

decisions.reviewerNote: 少少 is a headless quantity object for an ingredient added to the drink.

好多郭富城嘅歌 is the overt quantified object of 播咗.

decisions.reviewerNote: 兩粒 denotes spots that appeared and is the postverbal subject/theme of 出咗.

decisions.reviewerNote: 成個月假期 is the overt quantified leave object accumulated by 儲咗.

decisions.reviewerNote: 一兩成位 is the overt quantified portion of seats sold by 賣咗.
一啲獎項 is the overt quantified object of 攞咗.
好多獎項 is the overt quantified object of 攞咗.
六壯士 is the predicative role complement of 成為咗, not an object.

幾年 measures the duration associated with the opaque restaurant-meat predicate and is not an overt theme object.
